examples: The only reply is the wind soughing in the oaks and the occasional clonk of a cowbell.
So he tied a cowbell to her ankle, so he could hear at night if she tried to get out of bed.
I ring a cowbell and I've even played the accordion, but the ukulele doesn't seem to have any effect on them.
Martinez sits center stage, and to his right is Jhair Sala, who plays the cowbell and the bongos.
